- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Publish
  condition: and(succeeded(), ne('${{ parameters.publishProjects }}', ''))
  inputs:
    targetType: inline
    workingDirectory: '$(Build.SourcesDirectory)'
    script: |
      Write-Host "Current directory:"
      Get-Location

      $projectPath = Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter "WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj" |
        Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName

      Write-Host "Publishing project:"
      Write-Host $projectPath

      if (-not $projectPath) {
        throw "Azure Functions csproj not found from Build.SourcesDirectory."
      }

      Write-Host "Project exists:"
      Write-Host (Test-Path $projectPath)

      dotnet publish $projectPath `
        --configuration ${{ parameters.buildConfiguration }} `
        --framework net8.0 `
        --output "$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)"
